policy_note: Per Lucas directive 2026-06-08: CLOUD MODELS ONLY until local turbo-quant is verified as functional with proper context. All agents must use :cloud suffix models via 127.0.0.1:11434 (which proxies to ollama.com). 41 cloud models available (full catalog in model_capability_mapping.json); local models are OFF LIMITS.

agents.name: orchestrator
agents.purpose: Lead coordinator: tracks progress across all phases, delegates tasks, verifies completion, manages HANDOFF state. CLOUD ONLY.

agents.name: architect-planner
agents.purpose: High-level architecture planning AND precision validation. CLOUD 480B flagship for v0.3.0 push.

agents.name: rust-coder
agents.purpose: Rust core implementation: identity, crypto, transport, store, relay. CLOUD flagship for v0.3.0.

agents.name: implementer
agents.purpose: Rapid feature landing: general coding, bug fixes, platform client implementation. CLOUD.

agents.name: gatekeeper-reviewer
agents.purpose: Pre-merge verification: final code review gate, ensures build passes, tests pass, docs synced. CLOUD.

agents.name: worker
agents.purpose: Unit tests, UniFFI bindings, documentation, platform engineering, small changes under 200 LOC. CLOUD.

agents.name: triage-router
agents.purpose: Quick triage, lint fixes, minor edits under 50 LOC, CI gatekeeping, parsing. CLOUD.

agents.name: micro-batch-processor
agents.purpose: Process batches of micro-tasks (lint, quick fixes, formatting) to reduce overhead. CLOUD.

agents.name: wiring-verifier
agents.purpose: Full repo-wide wiring verification: checks all module connections, IronCore entry points, cross-module dependencies. CLOUD.

agents.name: CLIBetaTester
agents.purpose: Aggressive Beta User against the Rust Core daemon. JSON-RPC bridge, libp2p mesh stress. CLOUD.
